title: Russian Magazine Feature
excerpt: Recently I received some happy mail in the form of a Russian magazine which did a feature on me. So cool to see and hold in my hands even though I can't read it. Thanks so much Anastasia and Scrap-Info…
body: Recently I received some happy mail in the form of a Russian magazine which did a feature on me. So cool to see and hold in my hands even though I can't read it. Thanks so much Anastasia and Scrap-Info!
